summary: Iteration 44: Complete frontend testing of 3 new enhancements - Leave Calendar View, Reconciliation improvements, and Dark Mode polish. All features working correctly. Leave calendar shows monthly grid with colored leave bars, date click shows details, month navigation works. Reconciliation has Diff % column, batch verify button, export CSV button, and status pie chart. Dark mode toggle persists across all pages.

issues: Console warning: HTML nesting error - <tr> cannot be child of <span>. This is likely from a React dev tools wrapper but should be monitored.

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (4 approved leaves for Ahmed Khan, 3 active loans, 1 bank statement)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 44 tested the 3 new enhancements. Leave Calendar shows February 2026 with Ahmed Khan's approved leaves displayed as green bars spanning Feb 10-28. Calendar month navigation works. Date click shows leave details in right panel. Reconciliation page has new Diff % column, Batch Verify All Matched button, Export CSV button, and StatusPieChart. Dark mode toggle persists across pages.
